top_signals.title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
top_signals.summary: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU seeks to 'intensify' talks with U.S. on advanced cyber AI models, official tells CNBC, amid Mythos concerns
top_signals.summary: Anthropic's Mythos model, which has advanced cyber abilities, has prompted a wave of concern from governments and businesses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon blasts Coinbase’s Brian Armstrong, plans to fight Clarity Act
top_signals.summary: Dimon said Coinbase's Armstrong is spending hundreds of millions of dollars trying to get Clarity Act passed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Burberry delays climate pledge by a decade to 2050
top_signals.summary: Burberry has pushed back its net zero target by a decade, becoming the latest blue-chip business to water down ambitious climate goals set in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic, City AM can reveal. The high-end fashion firm, known for its trench coats and tartan scarves, made the decision to delay its target to become [...]
